chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-137 of 2023 (Kamran Ali and others Vs. Province of Sindh & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 618/2023 (Stay) 3. For hearing of main case. 28-02-2024. Mr. Aamir Ali Bhutto, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Shaharyar Imdad Awan, Assistant A.G, Sindh. ******** 1. Over ruled. 2&3. At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that he would not press the disposal of instant petition before this Court on merits provided Secretary Worker Welfare Board Sindh Labour Department at Karachi is directed to decide the applications/representations of the petitioners in accordance with law within three months, which is not opposed by learned Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. In view of above, the instant petition is dismissed as not pressed with direction to Secretary Worker Welfare Board Sindh Labour Department at Karachi to dispose of the applications/representations of the petitioners in accordance with law within three months after receipt of copy of this Order, if those are pending with him. No order as to costs. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
